channel.title: GrantOtter — Federal Funding Updates
channel.description: Aggregated weekly feed of grant opportunities and agency news from NIH, NSF, and DARPA.

item.title: Notice of Informational Webinar on the NIGMS Maximizing Investigators Research Award (MIRA) for Early Stage Investigators (ESI) (R35)
item.description: Notice NOT-GM-26-006 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: RAPIIDly transitioning shelf-stable blood substitutes to the battlefield
item.description: New program seeks FDA authorization for fieldable blood analog system in 2029.

item.title: Notice to Extend the Expiration Date for PAR-25-096 "Secondary Analysis and Integration of Existing Data to Elucidate Cancer Risk and Related Outcomes (R21 Clinical Trial Not Allowed)"
item.description: Notice NOT-CA-26-012 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Notice to Extend the Expiration Date for PAR-25-095 "Secondary Analysis and Integration of Existing Data to Elucidate Cancer Risk and Related Outcomes (R01 Clinical Trial Not Allowed)"
item.description: Notice NOT-CA-26-011 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: FY25 Enrollment Data from NIH-Supported Clinical Research Now Available
item.description: As part of NIH’s continued efforts to increase the transparency of the NIH research portfolio, data on the sex, race, ethnicity, and age of participants in fiscal year (FY) 2025 NIH-supported clinical research are now available.

item.title: RFI: Advanced Penetration Physics and Shock Propagation Control
item.description: DARPA seeks to identify disruptive approaches that redefine the state of the art in penetration mechanics and the control of shock propagation in solids.

item.title: NSF launches Tech Accelerators initiative to speed key technologies to the market faster
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation announced the launch of the NSF Tech Accelerators initiative to transform research outputs emanating from basic research into scalable and market-ready...

item.title: Reminder Definition of Foreign Components
item.description: Notice NOT-OD-26-084 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Notice of NCATS Participation in Notice of Funding Opportunity (NOFO) PA-25-301 NIH Research Project Grant (Parent R01 Clinical Trial Not Allowed)
item.description: Notice NOT-TR-26-007 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: July 3 (Friday), 2026: NIH Closed for the Federal Holiday
item.description: NIH (including help desks) will be closed on Friday, July 3, 2026 for the federal holiday (Independence Day).

item.title: NSF deploys $250 million to restart Small Business Innovation Research & Small Business Tech Transfer programs, including a new $40 million pilot emphasis on next-generation scientific instrumentation
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation today relaunched its Small Business Innovation Research/Small Business Technology Transfer programs with $250 million for the nation's startups and small...

item.title: NIDCD Fellowship and Loan Repayment Program Pre-Application Information Sessions
item.description: Notice NOT-DC-26-005 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Notice of Change: NINDS Participation in "Mentored Research Scientist Development Award (Parent K01)
item.description: Notice NOT-NS-26-001 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts
